Tenue wardrobe manager

Tenue is a command-line tool. It runs on Python and SQL.

   ==jgs==!====!=====!=====!====!===!===!=====!===!===!====
         /`\__/`\   /`\   /`\  |~| |~|  /)=I=(\  /`"""`\
        |        | |   `"`   | | | | |  |  :  | |   :   |
        '-|    |-' '-|     |-' )/\ )/\  |  T  \ '-| : |-'
          |    |     |     |  / \// \/  (  |\  |  '---'
          '.__.'     '.___.'  \_/ \_/   |  |/  /
                                        |  /  /
                                        |  \ /
                                        '--'`

features:

  • catalog your clothes
  • modify outfits in seconds
  • search clothes and outfits with keywords


Check out the source code on GitHub.
